# Pinned via the install command for the right index URL.
# Install PyTorch nightly with CUDA 12.8 (Blackwell sm_120/sm_121 support).
# Use: pip install --pre torch --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly/cu128
#
# The packages below are installed from PyPI (no special index needed).
# Triton is bundled with torch nightly; we do not pin it separately so we
# pick up whatever the nightly ships (Blackwell support landed in Triton 3.2+).

transformers>=4.51.0      # Qwen3 support landed in 4.51
accelerate>=1.0.0
safetensors>=0.4.5
huggingface_hub>=0.26.0
numpy>=2.0
psutil>=6.0
nvitop>=1.4
sentencepiece>=0.2.0
protobuf>=4.25
